name: Bulbasaur
flavorText: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this Pokémon is born. The seed slowly grows larger.

name: Ivysaur
flavorText: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

name: Venusaur
flavorText: Its plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: Charmander
flavorText: It has a preference for hot things. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: Charmeleon
flavorText: It has a barbaric nature. In battle, it whips its fiery tail around and slashes away with sharp claws.

name: Charizard
flavorText: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

name: Squirtle
flavorText: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.

name: Wartortle
flavorText: It is recognized as a symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that Wartortle is very old.

name: Blastoise
flavorText: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.

name: Ekans
flavorText: By dislocating its jaw, it can swallow prey larger than itself. After a meal, it curls up and rests.

name: Arbok
flavorText: The latest research has determined that there are over 20 possible arrangements of the patterns on its stomach.

name: Pikachu
flavorText: Pikachu that can generate powerful electricity have cheek sacs that are extra soft and super stretchy.

name: Raichu
flavorText: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

name: Sandshrew
flavorText: It loves to bathe in the grit of dry, sandy areas. By sand bathing, the Pokémon rids itself of dirt and moisture clinging to its body.

name: Sandslash
flavorText: The drier the area Sandslash lives in, the harder and smoother the Pokémon’s spikes will feel when touched.

name: Clefairy
flavorText: It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.

name: Clefable
flavorText: A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen, it will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Vulpix
flavorText: While young, it has six gorgeous tails. When it grows, several new tails are sprouted.

name: Ninetales
flavorText: It is said to live 1,000 years, and each of its tails is loaded with supernatural powers.

name: Alolan Ninetales
flavorText: It is said to live 1,000 years, and each of its tails is loaded with supernatural powers.

name: Jigglypuff
flavorText: Jigglypuff has top-notch lung capacity, even by comparison to other Pokémon. It won’t stop singing its lullabies until its foes fall asleep.

name: Wigglytuff
flavorText: The more air it takes in, the more it inflates. If opponents catch it in a bad mood, it will inflate itself to an enormous size to intimidate them.

name: Oddish
flavorText: If exposed to moonlight, it starts to move. It roams far and wide at night to scatter its seeds.

name: Gloom
flavorText: Its pistils exude an incredibly foul odor. The horrid stench can cause fainting at a distance of 1.25 miles.

name: Vileplume
flavorText: It has the world’s largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen.

name: Venonat
flavorText: Its big eyes are actually clusters of tiny eyes. At night, its kind is drawn by light.

name: Venomoth
flavorText: The scales it scatters will paralyze anyone who touches them, making that person unable to stand.

name: Diglett
flavorText: If a Diglett digs through a field, it leaves the soil perfectly tilled and ideal for planting crops.

name: Dugtrio
flavorText: A team of Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

name: Meowth
flavorText: It loves to collect shiny things. If it’s in a good mood, it might even let its Trainer have a look at its hoard of treasures.

name: Persian
flavorText: Getting this prideful Pokémon to warm up to you takes a lot of effort, and it will claw at you the moment it gets annoyed.

name: Psyduck
flavorText: Psyduck is constantly beset by headaches. If the Pokémon lets its strange power erupt, apparently the pain subsides for a while.

name: Golduck
flavorText: This Pokémon lives in gently flowing rivers. It paddles through the water with its long limbs, putting its graceful swimming skills on display.

name: Mankey
flavorText: It can spontaneously become enraged. Everyone near it clears out as it rampages, and the resulting loneliness makes it angrier still.

name: Primeape
flavorText: It has been known to become so angry that it dies as a result. Its face looks peaceful in death, however.

name: Growlithe
flavorText: It has a brave and trustworthy nature. It fearlessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes.

name: Arcanine
flavorText: The sight of it running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night has captivated many people.

name: Poliwag
flavorText: For Poliwag, swimming is easier than walking. The swirl pattern on its belly is actually part of the Pokémon’s innards showing through the skin.

name: Poliwhirl
flavorText: Staring at the swirl on its belly causes drowsiness. This trait of Poliwhirl’s has been used in place of lullabies to get children to go to sleep.

name: Poliwrath
flavorText: Its body is solid muscle. When swimming through cold seas, Poliwrath uses its impressive arms to smash through drift ice and plow forward.

name: Bellsprout
flavorText: Even though its body is extremely skinny, it is blindingly fast when catching its prey.

name: Weepinbell
flavorText: The leafy parts act as cutters for slashing foes. It spits a fluid that dissolves everything.

name: Victreebel
flavorText: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

name: Tentacool
flavorText: Tentacool is not a particularly strong swimmer. It drifts across the surface of shallow seas as it searches for prey.

name: Tentacruel
flavorText: When the red orbs on Tentacruel’s head glow brightly, watch out. The Pokémon is about to fire off a burst of ultrasonic waves.

name: Geodude
flavorText: Its round body makes it easy to pick up, but it is hard and heavy. It’s dangerous to play with them as if they were snowballs.

name: Graveler
flavorText: Mossy rocks are its favorite food. It can devour a ton a day while crunching loudly.

name: Golem
flavorText: Its body can survive dynamite blasts without a single scratch, but it hates rain and humidity.

name: Slowpoke
flavorText: Slow-witted and oblivious, this Pokémon won’t feel any pain if its tail gets eaten. It won’t notice when its tail grows back, either.

name: Slowbro
flavorText: Slowpoke became Slowbro when a Shellder bit on to its tail. Sweet flavors seeping from the tail make the Shellder feel as if its life is a dream.

name: Magnemite
flavorText: At times, Magnemite runs out of electricity and ends up on the ground. If you give batteries to a grounded Magnemite, it’ll start moving again.

name: Magneton
flavorText: This Pokémon is three Magnemite that have linked together. Magneton sends out powerful radio waves to study its surroundings.

name: Doduo
flavorText: A two-headed Pokémon that was discovered as a sudden mutation. It runs at a pace of over 60 miles per hour.

name: Dodrio
flavorText: An enemy that takes its eyes off any of the three heads--even for a second--will get pecked severely.

name: Seel
flavorText: It has always been supposed that Seel live only in cold seas. Their having shown up in Alola is a mystery.

name: Dewgong
flavorText: It swims through the ocean at a speed of eight knots, searching for Pokémon that will become its prey. It’s especially fond of Wishiwashi.

name: Grimer
flavorText: Its main source of food is the slimy industrial waste of factories. This Pokémon’s numbers have been decreasing in recent years.

name: Muk
flavorText: The stench it gives off will make your nose scrunch up. Still, there are Muk fans who think that’s a good thing.

name: Shellder
flavorText: It swims facing backward by opening and closing its two-piece shell. It is surprisingly fast.

name: Cloyster
flavorText: Its shell is extremely hard. It cannot be shattered, even with a bomb. The shell opens only when it is attacking.

name: Gastly
flavorText: Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.

name: Haunter
flavorText: Its tongue is made of gas. If licked, its victim starts shaking constantly until death eventually comes.

name: Gengar
flavorText: On the night of a full moon, if shadows move on their own and laugh, it must be Gengar’s doing.

name: Drowzee
flavorText: A Pokémon that nourishes itself by eating dreams, it is thought to share common ancestry with Munna and Musharna.

name: Hypno
flavorText: While it is an extremely dangerous Pokémon, people who are in need of a good, sound sleep call it their savior.

name: Voltorb
flavorText: It was discovered when Poké Balls were introduced. It is said that there is some connection.

name: Electrode
flavorText: It explodes in response to even minor stimuli. It is feared, with the nickname of “The Bomb Ball.”

name: Exeggcute
flavorText: Though it may look like it’s just a bunch of eggs, it’s a proper Pokémon. Exeggcute communicates with others of its kind via telepathy, apparently.

name: Exeggutor
flavorText: Each of Exeggutor’s three heads is thinking different thoughts. The three don’t seem to be very interested in one another.

name: Hitmonlee
flavorText: This amazing Pokémon has an awesome sense of balance. It can kick in succession from any position.

name: Hitmonchan
flavorText: Its punches slice the air. They are launched at such high speed, even a slight graze could cause a burn.

name: Koffing
flavorText: Its body is full of poisonous gas. It floats into garbage dumps, seeking out the fumes of raw, rotting trash.

name: Weezing
flavorText: It mixes gases between its two bodies. It’s said that these Pokémon were seen all over the Galar region back in the day.

name: Rhyhorn
flavorText: Strong, but not too bright, this Pokémon can shatter even a skyscraper with its charging tackles.

name: Rhydon
flavorText: It begins walking on its hind legs after evolution. It can punch holes through boulders with its horn.

name: Chansey
flavorText: The egg Chansey carries is not only delicious but also packed with nutrition. It’s used as a high-class cooking ingredient.

name: Horsea
flavorText: Horsea makes its home in oceans with gentle currents. If this Pokémon is under attack, it spits out pitch-black ink and escapes.

name: Seadra
flavorText: It’s the males that raise the offspring. While Seadra are raising young, the spines on their backs secrete thicker and stronger poison.

name: Scyther
flavorText: As Scyther fights more and more battles, its scythes become sharper and sharper. With a single slice, Scyther can fell a massive tree.

name: Electabuzz
flavorText: Many power plants keep Ground-type Pokémon around as a defense against Electabuzz that come seeking electricity.

name: Magmar
flavorText: Magmar dispatches its prey with fire. But it regrets this habit once it realizes that it has burned its intended prey to a charred crisp.

name: Tauros
flavorText: When Tauros begins whipping itself with its tails, it’s a warning that the Pokémon is about to charge with astounding speed.

name: Magikarp
flavorText: It is virtually worthless in terms of both power and speed. It is the most weak and pathetic Pokémon in the world.

name: Gyarados
flavorText: It has an extremely aggressive nature. The Hyper Beam it shoots from its mouth totally incinerates all targets.

name: Lapras
flavorText: A smart and kindhearted Pokémon, it glides across the surface of the sea while its beautiful song echoes around it.

name: Ditto
flavorText: It can reconstitute its entire cellular structure to change into what it sees, but it returns to normal when it relaxes.

name: Eevee
flavorText: It has the ability to alter the composition of its body to suit its surrounding environment.

name: Vaporeon
flavorText: When Vaporeon’s fins begin to vibrate, it is a sign that rain will come within a few hours.

name: Jolteon
flavorText: If it is angered or startled, the fur all over its body bristles like sharp needles that pierce foes.

name: Flareon
flavorText: Once it has stored up enough heat, this Pokémon’s body temperature can reach up to 1,700 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Porygon
flavorText: State-of-the-art technology was used to create Porygon. It was the first artificial Pokémon to be created via computer programming.

name: Snorlax
flavorText: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

name: Galarian Zapdos
flavorText: This Pokémon has complete control over electricity. There are tales of Zapdos nesting in the dark depths of pitch-black thunderclouds.

name: Galarian Moltres
flavorText: It’s one of the legendary bird Pokémon. When Moltres flaps its flaming wings, they glimmer with a dazzling red glow.

name: Dratini
flavorText: Dratini dwells near bodies of rapidly flowing water, such as the plunge pools of waterfalls. As it grows, Dratini will shed its skin many times.

name: Dragonair
flavorText: This Pokémon lives in pristine oceans and lakes. It can control the weather, and it uses this power to fly into the sky, riding on the wind.

name: Dragonite
flavorText: It’s a kindhearted Pokémon. If it spots a drowning person or Pokémon, Dragonite simply must help them.

name: Mewtwo
flavorText: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene-splicing and DNA-engineering experiments.

name: Mew
flavorText: Because it can use all kinds of moves, many scientists believe Mew to be the ancestor of Pokémon.

name: Chikorita
flavorText: A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up sun rays.

name: Bayleef
flavorText: A spicy aroma emanates from around its neck. The aroma acts as a stimulant to restore health.

name: Meganium
flavorText: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.

name: Cyndaquil
flavorText: It is timid and always curls itself up in a ball. If attacked, it flares up its back for protection.

name: Quilava
flavorText: Before battle, it turns its back on its opponent to demonstrate how ferociously its fire blazes.

name: Typhlosion
flavorText: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.

name: Hisuian Typhlosion
flavorText: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.

name: Totodile
flavorText: It is small but rough and tough. It won’t hesitate to take a bite out of anything that moves.

name: Croconaw
flavorText: If it loses a fang, a new one grows back in its place. There are always 48 fangs lining its mouth.

name: Feraligatr
flavorText: It usually moves slowly, but it goes at blinding speed when it attacks and bites prey.

name: Sentret
flavorText: When acting as a lookout, it warns others of danger by screeching and hitting the ground with its tail.

name: Furret
flavorText: The mother puts its offspring to sleep by curling up around them. It corners foes with speed.

name: Hoothoot
flavorText: It always stands on one foot. It changes feet so fast, the movement can rarely be seen.

name: Noctowl
flavorText: Its eyes are specially developed to enable it to see clearly even in murky darkness and minimal light.

name: Spinarak
flavorText: It waits intently until its preferred prey, Cutiefly, gets caught in its web. In fact, it’s quite a patient Pokémon.

name: Ariados
flavorText: There are some areas where people use the string Ariados spins for their own weaving. The resulting cloth is popular for its strength.

name: Chinchou
flavorText: Its antennae, which evolved from a fin, have both positive and negative charges flowing through them.

name: Lanturn
flavorText: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea’s surface from a depth of over three miles.

name: Pichu
flavorText: Despite its small size, it can zap even adult humans. However, if it does so, it also surprises itself.

name: Cleffa
flavorText: According to local rumors, Cleffa are often seen in places where shooting stars have fallen.

name: Igglybuff
flavorText: Igglybuff loves to sing. Its marshmallow-like body gives off a faint sweet smell.

name: Mareep
flavorText: Clothing made from Mareep’s fleece is easily charged with static electricity, so a special process is used on it.

name: Flaaffy
flavorText: In the places on its body where fleece doesn’t grow, its skin is rubbery and doesn’t conduct electricity. Those spots are safe to touch.

name: Ampharos
flavorText: The light from its tail can be seen from space. This is why you can always tell exactly where it is, which is why it usually keeps the light off.

name: Bellossom
flavorText: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.

name: Marill
flavorText: This Pokémon uses its round tail as a float. The ball of Marill’s tail is filled with nutrients that have been turned into an oil.

name: Azumarill
flavorText: It spends most of its time in the water. On sunny days, Azumarill floats on the surface of the water and sunbathes.

name: Sudowoodo
flavorText: If a tree branch shakes when there is no wind, it’s a Sudowoodo, not a tree. It hides from the rain.

name: Politoed
flavorText: At nightfall, these Pokémon appear on the shores of lakes. They announce their territorial claims by letting out cries that sound like shouting.

name: Hoppip
flavorText: Its body is so light, it must grip the ground firmly with its feet to keep from being blown away.

name: Skiploom
flavorText: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluctuates up and down.

name: Jumpluff
flavorText: Blown by seasonal winds, it circles the globe, scattering cotton spores as it goes.

name: Aipom
flavorText: As it did more and more with its tail, its hands became clumsy. It makes its nest high in the treetops.

name: Sunkern
flavorText: It may plummet from the sky. If attacked by a Spearow, it will violently shake its leaves.

name: Sunflora
flavorText: As the hot season approaches, the petals on this Pokémon’s face become more vivid and lively.

name: Yanma
flavorText: Its eyes can see 360 degrees without moving its head. It won’t miss prey--even those behind it.

name: Wooper
flavorText: This Pokémon lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.

name: Quagsire
flavorText: It has an easygoing nature. It doesn’t care if it bumps its head on boats and boulders while swimming.

name: Espeon
flavorText: By reading air currents, it can predict things such as the weather or its foe’s next move.

name: Umbreon
flavorText: When this Pokémon becomes angry, its pores secrete a poisonous sweat, which it sprays at its opponent’s eyes.

name: Murkrow
flavorText: They awaken at dusk and take wing in the twilight, leading to the expression, “Get home before the Murkrow fly.”

name: Slowking
flavorText: Miraculously, this former Slowpoke’s latent intelligence was drawn out when Shellder poison raced through its brain.

name: Misdreavus
flavorText: It will use any means necessary to frighten people and absorb their life energy. It practices constantly to hone its skill in causing fear.

name: Girafarig
flavorText: While it sleeps, the head on its tail keeps watch. The tail doesn’t need to sleep.

name: Pineco
flavorText: Motionless, it hangs from trees, waiting for its bug Pokémon prey to come to it. Its favorite in Alola is Cutiefly.

name: Forretress
flavorText: When something approaches it, it fires off fragments of its steel shell in attack. This is not a conscious action but a conditioned reflex.

name: Dunsparce
flavorText: This Pokémon’s tiny wings have some scientists saying that Dunsparce used to fly through the sky in ancient times.

name: Gligar
flavorText: It usually clings to cliffs. When it spots its prey, it spreads its wings and glides down to attack.

name: Snubbull
flavorText: Despite its intimidating face, it’s quite cowardly. Its desperate attempts to appear threatening make it popular with people.

name: Granbull
flavorText: Its well-developed lower jaw and heavy fangs are its weapons. As long as it’s not provoked, it rarely bites.

name: Qwilfish
flavorText: When faced with a larger opponent, it swallows as much water as it can to match the opponent’s size.

name: Scizor
flavorText: Bulky pincers account for one third of Scizor’s body weight. A single swing of one of these pincers will crush a boulder completely.

name: Heracross
flavorText: Heracross loves sweet sap and will go looking through forests for it. The Pokémon uses its two antennae to pick up scents as it searches.

name: Sneasel
flavorText: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it suddenly extends the claws and startles its enemy.

name: Teddiursa
flavorText: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they’re soaked with honey.

name: Ursaring
flavorText: With its ability to distinguish any aroma, it unfailingly finds all food buried deep underground.

name: Slugma
flavorText: A common sight in volcanic areas, it slowly slithers around in a constant search for warm places.

name: Magcargo
flavorText: Its brittle shell occasionally spouts intense flames that circulate throughout its body.

name: Swinub
flavorText: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.

name: Piloswine
flavorText: If it charges at an enemy, the hairs on its back stand up straight. It is very sensitive to sound.

name: Delibird
flavorText: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.

name: Skarmory
flavorText: The pointed feathers of these Pokémon are sharper than swords. Skarmory and Corviknight fight viciously over territory.

name: Houndour
flavorText: It cooperates with others skillfully. When it becomes your partner, it’s very loyal to you as its Trainer and will obey your orders.

name: Houndoom
flavorText: They spew flames mixed with poison to finish off their opponents. They divvy up their prey evenly among the members of their pack.

name: Kingdra
flavorText: With the arrival of a storm at sea, this Pokémon will show itself on the surface. When a Kingdra and a Dragonite meet, a fierce battle ensues.

name: Phanpy
flavorText: As a sign of affection, it bumps with its snout. However, it is so strong, it may send you flying.

name: Donphan
flavorText: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its Tackle is strong enough to knock down a house.

name: Porygon2
flavorText: This is a Porygon that was updated with special data. Porygon2 develops itself by learning about many different subjects all on its own.

name: Stantler
flavorText: Staring at its antlers creates an odd sensation as if one were being drawn into their centers.

name: Smeargle
flavorText: The unique creations produced by each Smeargle are painted using the fluid that oozes from its tail. This is how it marks its territory.

name: Tyrogue
flavorText: It is always bursting with energy. To make itself stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.

name: Hitmontop
flavorText: It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground.

name: Elekid
flavorText: When a storm approaches, this Pokémon gets restless. Once Elekid hears the sound of thunder, it gets full-on rowdy.

name: Magby
flavorText: This Pokémon is still small and timid. Whenever Magby gets excited or surprised, flames leak from its mouth and its nose.

name: Blissey
flavorText: Whenever a Blissey finds a weakened Pokémon, it will share its egg and offer its care until the other Pokémon is all better.

name: Larvitar
flavorText: Born deep underground, it comes aboveground and becomes a pupa once it has finished eating the surrounding soil.

name: Pupitar
flavorText: Even sealed in its shell, it can move freely. Hard and fast, it has outstanding destructive power.

name: Tyranitar
flavorText: Its body can’t be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.

name: Treecko
flavorText: It quickly scales even vertical walls. It senses humidity with its tail to predict the next day’s weather.

name: Grovyle
flavorText: Its strongly developed thigh muscles give it astounding agility and jumping performance.

name: Sceptile
flavorText: The leaves that grow on its arms can slice down thick trees. It is without peer in jungle combat.

name: Torchic
flavorText: It has a flame sac inside its belly that perpetually burns. It feels warm if it is hugged.

name: Combusken
flavorText: Its kicking mastery lets it loose 10 kicks per second. It emits sharp cries to intimidate foes.

name: Blaziken
flavorText: It can clear a 30-story building in a leap. Its fiery punches scorch its foes.

name: Mudkip
flavorText: Its large tail fin propels it through water with powerful acceleration. It is strong in spite of its size.

name: Marshtomp
flavorText: Its sturdy legs give it sure footing, even in mud. It burrows into dirt to sleep.

name: Swampert
flavorText: Its arms are hard as rock. With one swing, it can break a boulder into pieces.

name: Poochyena
flavorText: A Pokémon with a persistent nature, it chases its chosen prey until the prey becomes exhausted.

name: Mightyena
flavorText: It will always obey the commands of a skilled Trainer. Its behavior arises from its living in packs in ancient times.

name: Lotad
flavorText: It searches about for clean water. If it does not drink water for too long, the leaf on its head wilts.

name: Lombre
flavorText: It is nocturnal and becomes active at nightfall. It feeds on aquatic mosses that grow in the riverbed.

name: Ludicolo
flavorText: The rhythm of bright, festive music activates Ludicolo’s cells, making it more powerful.

name: Seedot
flavorText: If it remains still, it looks just like a real nut. It delights in surprising foraging Pokémon.

name: Nuzleaf
flavorText: It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy.

name: Shiftry
flavorText: A Pokémon that was feared as a forest guardian. It can read the foe’s mind and take preemptive action.

name: Wingull
flavorText: It makes its nest on sheer cliffs. Riding the sea breeze, it glides up into the expansive skies.

name: Pelipper
flavorText: It is a messenger of the skies, carrying small Pokémon and eggs to safety in its bill.

name: Ralts
flavorText: It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and Pokémon. It hides if it senses hostility.

name: Kirlia
flavorText: If its Trainer becomes happy, it overflows with energy, dancing joyously while spinning about.

name: Gardevoir
flavorText: It has the power to predict the future. Its power peaks when it is protecting its Trainer.

name: Surskit
flavorText: It moves as if skating on the surface of the water. It often fights with Dewpider over food.

name: Masquerain
flavorText: It intimidates enemies with the eye-like patterns on its antennae. Its four wings allow it to fly in any direction.

name: Shroomish
flavorText: It prefers damp places. By day it remains still in the forest shade. It releases toxic powder from its head.

name: Breloom
flavorText: Its short arms stretch when it throws punches. Its technique is equal to that of pro boxers.

name: Slakoth
flavorText: The way Slakoth lolls around makes anyone who watches it feel like doing the same.

name: Vigoroth
flavorText: Its heartbeat is fast and its blood so agitated that it can’t sit still for one second.

name: Slaking
flavorText: The world’s laziest Pokémon. It moves to another spot when there’s no food left within its reach.

name: Makuhita
flavorText: It was originally brought in from another region, but now Makuhita from Alola are more famous.

name: Hariyama
flavorText: It is known for its fantastic strength, but as it grows older, it focuses more on training Makuhita.

name: Azurill
flavorText: The ball on Azurill’s tail bounces like a rubber ball, and it’s full of the nutrients the Pokémon needs to grow.

name: Nosepass
flavorText: The magnet in Nosepass’s nose provides an unerring compass, making it an excellent partner for Trainers going on a journey.

name: Sableye
flavorText: This Pokémon is feared. When its gemstone eyes begin to glow with a sinister shine, it’s believed that Sableye will steal people’s spirits away.

name: Meditite
flavorText: It always trains deep in mountains. It levitates when it heightens its spiritual power through meditation.

name: Medicham
flavorText: It elegantly avoids attacks with dance-like steps, then launches a devastating blow in the same motion.

name: Plusle
flavorText: It cheers on friends with pom-poms made of sparks. It drains power from telephone poles.

name: Minun
flavorText: Exposure to electricity from Minun and Plusle promotes blood circulation and relaxes muscles.

name: Volbeat
flavorText: It communicates with others by lighting up its rear at night. It loves Illumise’s sweet aroma.

name: Illumise
flavorText: Its fragrance attracts a swarm of Volbeat, so they draw over 200 patterns in the night sky.

name: Gulpin
flavorText: It has a small heart and brain. Its stomach comprises most of its body, with enzymes to dissolve anything.

name: Swalot
flavorText: It swallows anything whole. It sweats toxic fluids from its follicles to douse foes.

name: Numel
flavorText: Its humped back stores intensely hot magma. In rain, the magma cools, slowing its movement.

name: Camerupt
flavorText: The volcanoes on its back have a major eruption every 10 years--or whenever it becomes really angry.

name: Torkoal
flavorText: It burns coal inside its shell for energy. It blows out black soot if it is endangered.

name: Spoink
flavorText: It bounces constantly, using its tail like a spring. The shock of bouncing keeps its heart beating.

name: Grumpig
flavorText: It uses black pearls to amplify its psychic power. It does a strange dance to control foes’ minds.

name: Trapinch
flavorText: Its nest is a sloped, bowl-like pit in the desert. Once something has fallen in, there is no escape.

name: Vibrava
flavorText: The ultrasonic waves it generates by rubbing its two wings together cause severe headaches.

name: Flygon
flavorText: This Pokémon hides in the heart of sandstorms it creates and seldom appears where people can see it.

name: Cacnea
flavorText: It lives in arid locations. Its yellow flowers bloom once a year.

name: Cacturne
flavorText: It becomes active at night, seeking prey that is exhausted from the day’s desert heat.

name: Swablu
flavorText: Its cottony wings are full of air, making them light and fluffy to the touch. Swablu takes diligent care of its wings.

name: Altaria
flavorText: As it flies in a calm and relaxed manner, Altaria performs a humming song that would enrapture any audience.

name: Zangoose
flavorText: It has feuded with Seviper for many generations. Its sharp claws are its biggest weapons.

name: Seviper
flavorText: In battle, it uses its bladed tail to counter any Zangoose. It secretes a deadly venom in its tail.

name: Barboach
flavorText: Its slimy body is hard to grasp. In one region, it is said to have been born from hardened mud.

name: Whiscash
flavorText: It makes its nest at the bottom of swamps. It will eat anything—if it is alive, Whiscash will eat it.

name: Corphish
flavorText: No matter how dirty the water in the river, it will adapt and thrive. It has a strong will to survive.

name: Crawdaunt
flavorText: A rough customer that wildly flails its giant claws. It is said to be extremely hard to raise.

name: Feebas
flavorText: Although unattractive and unpopular, this Pokémon’s marvelous vitality has made it a subject of research.

name: Milotic
flavorText: Milotic has provided inspiration to many artists. It has even been referred to as the most beautiful Pokémon of all.

name: Shuppet
flavorText: It eats up emotions like malice, jealousy, and resentment, so some people are grateful for its presence.

name: Banette
flavorText: It’s a stuffed toy that was thrown away and became possessed, ever searching for the one who threw it away so it can exact its revenge.

name: Duskull
flavorText: If it finds bad children who won’t listen to their parents, it will spirit them away—or so it’s said.

name: Dusclops
flavorText: Its body is entirely hollow. When it opens its mouth, it sucks everything in as if it were a black hole.

name: Tropius
flavorText: The bunches of fruit growing around the necks of Tropius in Alola are especially sweet compared to those in other regions.

name: Chimecho
flavorText: It uses the sucker on its head to hang from a tree or from eaves. It can produce seven different tones.

name: Snorunt
flavorText: It’s said that if they are seen at midnight, they’ll cause heavy snow. They eat snow and ice to survive.

name: Glalie
flavorText: It has a body of ice that won’t melt, even with fire. It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere.

name: Luvdisc
flavorText: If a Luvdisc is left on its own, it becomes despondent, leaving itself open to attack. That is when Pelipper snatch them up.

name: Bagon
flavorText: Bagon jumps off cliffs every day, trying to grow stronger so that someday it will be able to fly.

name: Shelgon
flavorText: This Pokémon has covered its body in a hard shell that has the same composition as bone. Shelgon stores energy for evolution.

name: Salamence
flavorText: Salamence is an unusual Pokémon in that it was able to evolve a body with wings just by constantly wishing to be able to fly.

name: Beldum
flavorText: From its rear, Beldum emits a magnetic force that rapidly pulls opponents in. They get skewered on Beldum’s sharp claws.

name: Metang
flavorText: Two Beldum have become stuck together via their own magnetic forces. With two brains, the resulting Metang has doubled psychic powers.

name: Metagross
flavorText: Because the magnetic powers of these Pokémon get stronger in freezing temperatures, Metagross living on snowy mountains are full of energy.

name: Kyogre
flavorText: A mythical Pokémon said to have swelled the seas with rain and tidal waves. It battled with Groudon.

name: Turtwig
flavorText: Photosynthesis occurs across its body under the sun. The shell on its back is actually hardened soil.

name: Grotle
flavorText: It lives along water in forests. In the daytime, it leaves the forest to sunbathe its treed shell.

name: Torterra
flavorText: Ancient people imagined that beneath the ground, a gigantic Torterra dwelled.

name: Chimchar
flavorText: Its fiery rear end is fueled by gas made in its belly. Even rain can’t extinguish the fire.

name: Monferno
flavorText: It skillfully controls the intensity of the fire on its tail to keep its foes at an ideal distance.

name: Infernape
flavorText: Its crown of fire is indicative of its fiery nature. It is beaten by none in terms of quickness.

name: Piplup
flavorText: It doesn’t like to be taken care of. It’s difficult to bond with since it won’t listen to its Trainer.

name: Prinplup
flavorText: It lives alone, away from others. Apparently, every one of them believes it is the most important.

name: Empoleon
flavorText: It swims as fast as a jet boat. The edges of its wings are sharp and can slice apart drifting ice.

name: Starly
flavorText: They flock in great numbers. Though small, they flap their wings with great power.

name: Staravia
flavorText: They maintain huge flocks, although fierce scuffles break out between various flocks.

name: Staraptor
flavorText: The muscles in its wings and legs are strong. It can easily fly while gripping a small Pokémon.

name: Kricketot
flavorText: It chats with others using the sounds of its colliding antennae. These sounds are fall hallmarks.

name: Kricketune
flavorText: It crosses its knifelike arms in front of its chest when it cries. It can compose melodies ad lib.

name: Shinx
flavorText: This Pokémon generates electricity by contracting its muscles. Excited trembling is a sign that Shinx is generating a tremendous amount of electricity.

name: Luxio
flavorText: By joining its tail with that of another Luxio, this Pokémon can receive some of the other Luxio’s electricity and power up its own electric blasts.

name: Luxray
flavorText: Luxray can see through solid objects. It will instantly spot prey trying to hide behind walls, even if the walls are thick.

name: Cranidos
flavorText: It lived in jungles around a hundred million years ago. It used its skillful headbutts to combat Aerodactyl.

name: Rampardos
flavorText: The result of repeated headbutts is a skull grown thick and hard. However, its brain has shrunk in size compared with Cranidos’s.

name: Shieldon
flavorText: Many fossils of this Pokémon have been found, but almost none have shown signs of damage to the face.

name: Bastiodon
flavorText: While it can guard against any sort of attack from the front, it is left without recourse when attacked from behind.

name: Combee
flavorText: The members of the trio spend all their time together. Each one has a slightly different taste in nectar.

name: Vespiquen
flavorText: It skillfully commands its grubs in battles with its enemies. The grubs are willing to risk their lives to defend Vespiquen.

name: Pachirisu
flavorText: It makes fur balls that crackle with static electricity. It stores them with berries in tree holes.

name: Buizel
flavorText: It swims by rotating its two tails like a screw. When it dives, its flotation sac collapses.

name: Floatzel
flavorText: It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people.

name: Shellos
flavorText: This Pokémon’s habitat shapes its physique. According to some theories, life in warm ocean waters causes this variation to develop.

name: Gastrodon
flavorText: Its search for food sometimes leads it onto land, where it leaves behind a sticky trail of slime as it passes through.

name: Ambipom
flavorText: In their search for comfortable trees, they get into territorial disputes with groups of Passimian. They win about half the time.

name: Drifloon
flavorText: Perhaps seeking company, it approaches children. However, it often quickly runs away again when the children play too roughly with it.

name: Drifblim
flavorText: Some say this Pokémon is a collection of souls burdened with regrets, silently drifting through the dusk.

name: Mismagius
flavorText: It appears as if from nowhere—muttering incantations, placing curses, and giving people terrifying visions.

name: Honchkrow
flavorText: A single cry from this nocturnal Pokémon, and more than a hundred of its Murkrow cronies will assemble.

name: Chingling
flavorText: Each time it hops, it makes a ringing sound. It deafens foes by emitting high-frequency cries.

name: Stunky
flavorText: From its rear, it sprays a foul-smelling liquid at opponents. It aims for their faces, and it can hit them from over 16 feet away.

name: Skuntank
flavorText: In its belly, it reserves stinky fluid that it shoots from its tail during battle. As this Pokémon’s diet varies, so does the stench of its fluid.

name: Bronzor
flavorText: It appears in ancient ruins. The pattern on its body doesn’t come from any culture in the Galar region, so it remains shrouded in mystery.

name: Bronzong
flavorText: Some believe it to be a deity that summons rain clouds. When angered, it lets out a warning cry that rings out like the tolling of a bell.

name: Bonsly
flavorText: It expels both sweat and tears from its eyes. The sweat is a little salty, while the tears have a slight bitterness.

name: Happiny
flavorText: Mimicking Chansey, Happiny will place an egg- shaped stone in its belly pouch. Happiny will treasure this stone.

name: Spiritomb
flavorText: Exactly 108 spirits gathered to become this Pokémon. Apparently there are some ill-natured spirits in the mix.

name: Gible
flavorText: Gible prefers to stay in narrow holes in the sides of caves heated by geothermal energy. This way, Gible can stay warm even during a blizzard.

name: Gabite
flavorText: This Pokémon emits ultrasonic waves from a protrusion on either side of its head to probe pitch-dark caves.

name: Garchomp
flavorText: Garchomp makes its home in volcanic mountains. It flies through the sky as fast as a jet airplane, hunting down as much prey as it can.

name: Munchlax
flavorText: Stuffing itself with vast amounts of food is its only concern. Whether the food is rotten or fresh, yummy or tasteless—it does not care.

name: Riolu
flavorText: It’s exceedingly energetic, with enough stamina to keep running all through the night. Taking it for walks can be a challenging experience.

name: Lucario
flavorText: It controls waves known as auras, which are powerful enough to pulverize huge rocks. It uses these waves to take down its prey.

name: Hippopotas
flavorText: It moves through the sands with its mouth open, swallowing sand along with its prey. It gets rid of the sand by spouting it from its nose.

name: Hippowdon
flavorText: Stones can get stuck in the ports on their bodies. Dwebble help dislodge such stones, so Hippowdon look after these Pokémon.

name: Croagunk
flavorText: It makes frightening noises with its poison-filled cheek sacs. When opponents flinch, Croagunk hits them with a poison jab.

name: Toxicroak
flavorText: It bounces toward opponents and gouges them with poisonous claws. No more than a scratch is needed to knock out its adversaries.

name: Finneon
flavorText: It absorbs sunlight with the pink areas of its skin, which then shine. This appears to be a form of camouflage.

name: Lumineon
flavorText: With its shining light, it lures its prey close. However, the light also happens to attract ferocious fish Pokémon—its natural predators.

name: Snover
flavorText: It lives on snowy mountains. It sinks its legs into the snow to absorb water and keep its own temperature down.

name: Abomasnow
flavorText: If it sees any packs of Darumaka going after Snover, it chases them off, swinging its sizable arms like hammers.

name: Weavile
flavorText: They attack their quarry in packs. Prey as large as Mamoswine easily fall to the teamwork of a group of Weavile.

name: Magnezone
flavorText: Some say that Magnezone receives signals from space via the antenna on its head and that it’s being controlled by some mysterious being.

name: Rhyperior
flavorText: It can load up to three projectiles per arm into the holes in its hands. What launches out of those holes could be either rocks or Roggenrola.

name: Electivire
flavorText: The amount of electrical energy this Pokémon produces is proportional to the rate of its pulse. The voltage jumps while Electivire is battling.

name: Magmortar
flavorText: When Magmortar inhales deeply, the fire burning in its belly intensifies, rising in temperature to over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Yanmega
flavorText: It prefers to battle by biting apart foes’ heads instantly while flying by at high speed.

name: Leafeon
flavorText: Galarians favor the distinctive aroma that drifts from this Pokémon’s leaves. There’s a popular perfume made using that scent.

name: Glaceon
flavorText: Any who become captivated by the beauty of the snowfall that Glaceon creates will be frozen before they know it.

name: Gliscor
flavorText: It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops!

name: Mamoswine
flavorText: This Pokémon can be spotted in wall paintings from as far back as 10,000 years ago. For a while, it was thought to have gone extinct.

name: Porygon Z
flavorText: Porygon-Z had a program installed to allow it to move between dimensions, but the program also caused instability in Porygon-Z’s behavior.

name: Gallade
flavorText: True to its honorable-warrior image, it uses the blades on its elbows only in defense of something or someone.

name: Probopass
flavorText: It radiates such a powerful magnetic field that nearby electrical appliances become unusable.

name: Dusknoir
flavorText: At the bidding of transmissions from the spirit world, it steals people and Pokémon away. No one knows whether it has a will of its own.

name: Froslass
flavorText: After a woman met her end on a snowy mountain, her regrets lingered on. From them, this Pokémon was born. Its favorite food is frozen souls.

name: Rotom
flavorText: One boy’s invention led to the development of many different machines that take advantage of Rotom’s unique capabilities.

name: Cresselia
flavorText: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

name: Manaphy
flavorText: It is born with a wondrous power that lets it bond with any kind of Pokémon.

name: Arceus
flavorText: According to the legends of Sinnoh, this Pokémon emerged from an egg and shaped all there is in this world.

name: Snivy
flavorText: Being exposed to sunlight makes its movements swifter. It uses vines more adeptly than its hands.

name: Servine
flavorText: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip.

name: Serperior
flavorText: It only gives its all against strong opponents who are not fazed by the glare from Serperior’s noble eyes.

name: Tepig
flavorText: It can deftly dodge its foe’s attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them.

name: Pignite
flavorText: The more it eats, the more fuel it has to make the fire in its stomach stronger. This fills it with even more power.

name: Emboar
flavorText: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.

name: Oshawott
flavorText: The scalchop on its stomach isn’t just used for battle--it can be used to break open hard berries as well.

name: Dewott
flavorText: Strict training is how it learns its flowing double-scalchop technique.

name: Samurott
flavorText: In the time it takes a foe to blink, it can draw and sheathe the seamitars attached to its front legs.

name: Hisuian Samurott
flavorText: In the time it takes a foe to blink, it can draw and sheathe the seamitars attached to its front legs.

name: Blitzle
flavorText: When thunderclouds cover the sky, it will appear. It can catch lightning with its mane and store the electricity.

name: Zebstrika
flavorText: When this ill-tempered Pokémon runs wild, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions.

name: Drilbur
flavorText: It brings its claws together and whirls around at high speed before rushing toward its prey.

name: Excadrill
flavorText: It’s not uncommon for tunnels that appear to have formed naturally to actually be a result of Excadrill’s rampant digging.

name: Timburr
flavorText: It loves helping out with construction projects. It loves it so much that if rain causes work to halt, it swings its log around and throws a tantrum.

name: Gurdurr
flavorText: It shows off its muscles to Machoke and other Gurdurr. If it fails to measure up to the other Pokémon, it lies low for a little while.

name: Conkeldurr
flavorText: Concrete mixed by Conkeldurr is much more durable than normal concrete, even when the compositions of the two materials are the same.

name: Sewaddle
flavorText: This Pokémon makes clothes for itself. It chews up leaves and sews them with sticky thread extruded from its mouth.

name: Swadloon
flavorText: Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life.

name: Leavanny
flavorText: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves by using the sticky silk secreted from its mouth.

name: Cottonee
flavorText: It shoots cotton from its body to protect itself. If it gets caught up in hurricane-strength winds, it can get sent to the other side of the Earth.

name: Whimsicott
flavorText: It scatters cotton all over the place as a prank. If it gets wet, it’ll become too heavy to move and have no choice but to answer for its mischief.

name: Petilil
flavorText: Petilil appears around sources of clean water. Boiling leaves from this Pokémon’s head results in a liquid that’s sometimes used as a bug repellent.

name: Lilligant
flavorText: It’s believed that even first-rate gardeners have a hard time getting the flower on a Lilligant’s head to bloom.

name: Basculin Red Striped
flavorText: Anglers love the fight this Pokémon puts up on the hook. And there are always more to catch— many people release them into lakes illicitly.

name: Sandile
flavorText: The desert gets cold at night, so when the sun sets, this Pokémon burrows deep into the sand and sleeps until sunrise.

name: Krokorok
flavorText: Krokorok has specialized eyes that enable it to see in the dark. This ability lets Krokorok hunt in the dead of night without getting lost.

name: Krookodile
flavorText: This Pokémon is known as the Bully of the Sands. Krookodile’s mighty jaws can bite through heavy plates of iron with almost no effort at all.

name: Scraggy
flavorText: If it locks eyes with you, watch out! Nothing and no one is safe from the reckless headbutts of this troublesome Pokémon.

name: Scrafty
flavorText: As halfhearted as this Pokémon’s kicks may seem, they pack enough power to shatter Conkeldurr’s concrete pillars.

name: Zorua
flavorText: Zorua is a timid Pokémon. This disposition seems to be what led to the development of Zorua’s ability to take on the forms of other creatures.

name: Zoroark
flavorText: This Pokémon cares deeply about others of its kind, and it will conjure terrifying illusions to keep its den and pack safe.

name: Minccino
flavorText: The way it brushes away grime with its tail can be helpful when cleaning. But its focus on spotlessness can make cleaning more of a hassle.

name: Cinccino
flavorText: Its body secretes oil that this Pokémon spreads over its nest as a coating to protect it from dust. Cinccino won’t tolerate even a speck of the stuff.

name: Gothita
flavorText: Though they’re still only babies, there’s psychic power stored in their ribbonlike feelers, and sometimes they use that power to fight.

name: Gothorita
flavorText: It’s said that when stars shine in the night sky, this Pokémon will spirit away sleeping children. Some call it the Witch of Punishment.

name: Gothitelle
flavorText: It has tremendous psychic power, but it dislikes conflict. It’s also able to predict the future based on the movement of the stars.

name: Solosis
flavorText: It communicates with others telepathically. Its body is encapsulated in liquid, but if it takes a heavy blow, the liquid will leak out.

name: Duosion
flavorText: Its psychic power can supposedly cover a range of more than half a mile—but only if its two brains can agree with each other.

name: Reuniclus
flavorText: While it could use its psychic abilities in battle, this Pokémon prefers to swing its powerful arms around to beat opponents into submission.

name: Ducklett
flavorText: When attacked, it uses its feathers to splash water, escaping under cover of the spray.

name: Swanna
flavorText: Despite their elegant appearance, they can flap their wings strongly and fly for thousands of miles.

name: Deerling
flavorText: Their coloring changes according to the seasons and can be slightly affected by the temperature and humidity as well.

name: Sawsbuck
flavorText: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck’s horns.

name: Foongus
flavorText: No one knows what the Poké Ball–like pattern on Foongus means or why Foongus has it.

name: Amoonguss
flavorText: This Pokémon puffs poisonous spores at its foes. If the spores aren’t washed off quickly, they’ll grow into mushrooms wherever they land.

name: Alomomola
flavorText: It uses its special mucus to close the wounds of injured Pokémon. The reason for this behavior remains unknown.

name: Joltik
flavorText: Joltik can be found clinging to other Pokémon. It’s soaking up static electricity because it can’t produce a charge on its own.

name: Galvantula
flavorText: It launches electrified fur from its abdomen as its means of attack. Opponents hit by the fur could be in for three full days and nights of paralysis.

name: Tynamo
flavorText: While one alone doesn’t have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.

name: Eelektrik
flavorText: It wraps itself around its prey and paralyzes it with electricity from the round spots on its sides. Then it chomps.

name: Eelektross
flavorText: With their sucker mouths, they suck in prey. Then they use their fangs to shock the prey with electricity.

name: Litwick
flavorText: The flame on its head keeps its body slightly warm. This Pokémon takes lost children by the hand to guide them to the spirit world.

name: Lampent
flavorText: This Pokémon appears just before someone passes away, so it’s feared as an emissary of death.

name: Chandelure
flavorText: This Pokémon haunts dilapidated mansions. It sways its arms to hypnotize opponents with the ominous dancing of its flames.

name: Axew
flavorText: These Pokémon nest in the ground and use their tusks to crush hard berries. Crushing berries is also how they test each other’s strength.

name: Fraxure
flavorText: After battle, this Pokémon carefully sharpens its tusks on river rocks. It needs to take care of its tusks—if one breaks, it will never grow back.

name: Haxorus
flavorText: Its resilient tusks are its pride and joy. It licks up dirt to take in the minerals it needs to keep its tusks in top condition.

name: Cubchoo
flavorText: When this Pokémon is in good health, its snot becomes thicker and stickier. It will smear its snot on anyone it doesn’t like.

name: Beartic
flavorText: It swims through frigid seas, searching for prey. From its frozen breath, it forms icy fangs that are harder than steel.

name: Cryogonal
flavorText: With its icy chains, Cryogonal freezes those it encounters. It then takes its victims away to somewhere unknown.

name: Mienfoo
flavorText: In one minute, a well-trained Mienfoo can chop with its arms more than 100 times.

name: Mienshao
flavorText: When Mienshao comes across a truly challenging opponent, it will lighten itself by biting off the fur on its arms.

name: Golett
flavorText: They were sculpted from clay in ancient times. No one knows why, but some of them are driven to continually line up boulders.

name: Golurk
flavorText: Artillery platforms built into the walls of ancient castles served as perches from which Golurk could fire energy beams.

name: Pawniard
flavorText: It uses river stones to maintain the cutting edges of the blades covering its body. These sharpened blades allow it to bring down opponents.

name: Bisharp
flavorText: It’s accompanied by a large retinue of Pawniard. Bisharp keeps a keen eye on its minions, ensuring none of them even think of double-crossing it.

name: Rufflet
flavorText: If it spies a strong Pokémon, Rufflet can’t resist challenging it to a battle. But if Rufflet loses, it starts bawling.

name: Braviary
flavorText: Known for its bravery and pride, this majestic Pokémon is often seen as a motif for various kinds of emblems.

name: Vullaby
flavorText: It wears a bone to protect its rear. It often squabbles with others of its kind over particularly comfy bones.

name: Mandibuzz
flavorText: Although it’s a bit of a ruffian, this Pokémon will take lost Vullaby under its wing and care for them till they’re ready to leave the nest.

name: Deino
flavorText: When it encounters something, its first urge is usually to bite it. If it likes what it tastes, it will commit the associated scent to memory.

name: Zweilous
flavorText: While hunting for prey, Zweilous wanders its territory, its two heads often bickering over which way to go.

name: Hydreigon
flavorText: There are a slew of stories about villages that were destroyed by Hydreigon. It bites anything that moves.

name: Larvesta
flavorText: The people of ancient times believed that Larvesta fell from the sun.

name: Volcarona
flavorText: Volcarona scatters burning scales. Some say it does this to start fires. Others say it’s trying to rescue those that suffer in the cold.

name: Chespin
flavorText: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.

name: Quilladin
flavorText: It relies on its sturdy shell to deflect predators’ attacks. It counterattacks with its sharp quills.

name: Chesnaught
flavorText: Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.

name: Fennekin
flavorText: Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Braixen
flavorText: It has a twig stuck in its tail. With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on fire and launches into battle.

name: Delphox
flavorText: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.

name: Froakie
flavorText: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.

name: Frogadier
flavorText: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away.

name: Greninja
flavorText: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.

name: Fletchling
flavorText: Its melodious cries are actually warnings. Fletchling will mercilessly peck at anything that enters its territory.

name: Fletchinder
flavorText: Fletchinder launches embers into the den of its prey. When the prey comes leaping out, Fletchinder’s sharp talons finish it off.

name: Talonflame
flavorText: Talonflame mainly preys upon other bird Pokémon. To intimidate opponents, it sends embers spewing from gaps between its feathers.

name: Scatterbug
flavorText: When under attack from bird Pokémon, it spews a poisonous black powder that causes paralysis on contact.

name: Spewpa
flavorText: It lives hidden within thicket shadows. When predators attack, it quickly bristles the fur covering its body in an effort to threaten them.

name: Vivillon
flavorText: Vivillon with many different patterns are found all over the world. These patterns are affected by the climate of their habitat.

name: Litleo
flavorText: When they’re young, they live with a pride. Once they’re able to hunt prey on their own, they’re kicked out and have to make their own way.

name: Pyroar Male
flavorText: The males are usually lazy, but when attacked by a strong foe, a male will protect its friends with no regard for its own safety.

name: Flabebe
flavorText: It’s not safe without the power of a flower, but it will keep traveling around until it finds one with the color and shape it wants.

name: Floette
flavorText: It raises flowers and uses them as weapons. The more gorgeous the blossom, the more power it contains.

name: Florges
flavorText: It controls the flowers it grows. The petal blizzards that Florges triggers are overwhelming in their beauty and power.

name: Skiddo
flavorText: Thought to be one of the first Pokémon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition.

name: Gogoat
flavorText: It can tell how its Trainer is feeling by subtle shifts in the grip on its horns. This empathic sense lets them run as if one being.

name: Espurr
flavorText: Though Espurr’s expression never changes, behind that blank stare is an intense struggle to contain its devastating psychic power.

name: Meowstic Male
flavorText: Revealing the eyelike patterns on the insides of its ears will unleash its psychic powers. It normally keeps the patterns hidden, however.

name: Inkay
flavorText: It spins while making its luminescent spots flash. These spots allow it to communicate with others by using different patterns of light.

name: Malamar
flavorText: Gazing at its luminescent spots will quickly induce a hypnotic state, putting the observer under Malamar’s control.

name: Skrelp
flavorText: It drifts in the ocean, blending in with floating seaweed. When other Pokémon come to feast on the seaweed, Skrelp feasts on them instead.

name: Dragalge
flavorText: Dragalge uses a poisonous liquid capable of corroding metal to send tankers that enter its territory to the bottom of the sea.

name: Clauncher
flavorText: Clauncher’s claws can fall off during battle, but they’ll regenerate. The meat inside the claws is popular as a delicacy in Galar.

name: Clawitzer
flavorText: After using the feelers on its oversized claw to detect the location of prey, Clawitzer launches a cannonball of water at its target.

name: Sylveon
flavorText: By releasing enmity-erasing waves from its ribbonlike feelers, Sylveon stops any conflict.

name: Hawlucha
flavorText: It drives its opponents to exhaustion with its agile maneuvers, then ends the fight with a flashy finishing move.

name: Dedenne
flavorText: A Dedenne’s whiskers pick up electrical waves other Dedenne send out. These Pokémon share locations of food or electricity with one another.

name: Carbink
flavorText: When beset by attackers, Carbink wipes them all out by firing high-energy beams from the gems embedded in its body.

name: Goomy
flavorText: Because most of its body is water, it will dry up if the weather becomes too arid. It’s considered the weakest dragon Pokémon.

name: Sliggoo
flavorText: Although this Pokémon isn’t very strong, its body is coated in a caustic slime that can melt through anything, so predators steer clear of it.

name: Goodra
flavorText: Sometimes it misunderstands instructions and appears dazed or bewildered. Many Trainers don’t mind, finding this behavior to be adorable.

name: Klefki
flavorText: This Pokémon is constantly collecting keys. Entrust a Klefki with important keys, and the Pokémon will protect them no matter what.

name: Phantump
flavorText: After a lost child perished in the forest, their spirit possessed a tree stump, causing the spirit’s rebirth as this Pokémon.

name: Trevenant
flavorText: People fear it due to a belief that it devours any who try to cut down trees in its forest, but to the Pokémon it shares its woods with, it’s kind.

name: Bergmite
flavorText: They chill the air around them to −150 degrees Fahrenheit, freezing the water in the air into ice that they use as armor.

name: Avalugg
flavorText: At high latitudes, this Pokémon can be found with clusters of Bergmite on its back as it swims among the icebergs.

name: Noibat
flavorText: After nightfall, they emerge from the caves they nest in during the day. Using their ultrasonic waves, they go on the hunt for ripened fruit.

name: Noivern
flavorText: Aggressive and cruel, this Pokémon will ruthlessly torment enemies that are helpless in the dark.

name: Hoopa
flavorText: This troublemaker sends anything and everything to faraway places using its loop, which can warp space.

name: Rowlet
flavorText: At a distance, it launches its sharp feathers while flying about. If the enemy gets too close, Rowlet switches tactics and delivers vicious kicks.

name: Dartrix
flavorText: It throws one knifelike feather after another at its enemies, and each one precisely strikes a weak point. These feathers are known as blade quills.

name: Decidueye
flavorText: As if wielding a bow, it launches the arrow quills hidden among the feathers of its wings. Decidueye’s shots never miss.

name: Litten
flavorText: It spends even the smallest amount of downtime grooming its fur with its tongue. Loose fur gathers in its stomach and serves as fuel for fiery moves.

name: Torracat
flavorText: In the midst of battle, the fire pouch on Torracat’s neck rings like a bell and produces stronger flames than usual.

name: Incineroar
flavorText: It excels at violent, no-holds-barred battles. The temperature of the flames that issue from its navel exceeds 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Popplio
flavorText: It creates special bouncy balloons to send at its opponents. When the balloons pop, the sheer force of their bursting is what deals damage.

name: Brionne
flavorText: As if dancing, it artfully dodges the attacks of its enemies. All the while, it’s busy forming a bunch of balloons to overwhelm its foes.

name: Primarina
flavorText: With its mouth, it makes sonic waves that sound like beautiful singing. It uses the sonic waves to control its water balloons.

name: Pikipek
flavorText: It can peck at a rate of 16 times a second to drill holes in trees. It uses the holes for food storage and for nesting.

name: Trumbeak
flavorText: It eats berries and stores their seeds in its beak. When it encounters enemies or prey, it fires off all the seeds in a burst.

name: Toucannon
flavorText: When it battles, its beak heats up. The temperature can easily exceed 212 degrees Fahrenheit, causing severe burns when it hits.

name: Yungoos
flavorText: With its sharp fangs, it will bite anything. It did not originally live in Alola but was imported from another region.

name: Gumshoos
flavorText: When it finds a trace of its prey, it patiently stakes out the location...but it’s always snoozing by nightfall.

name: Grubbin
flavorText: Its natural enemies, like Rookidee, may flee rather than risk getting caught in its large mandibles that can snap thick tree branches.

name: Charjabug
flavorText: While its durable shell protects it from attacks, Charjabug strikes at enemies with jolts of electricity discharged from the tips of its jaws.

name: Vikavolt
flavorText: It builds up electricity in its abdomen, focuses it through its jaws, and then fires the electricity off in concentrated beams.

name: Crabrawler
flavorText: While guarding its weak points with its pincers, it looks for an opening and unleashes punches. When it loses, it foams at the mouth and faints.

name: Crabominable
flavorText: It aimed for the top but got lost and ended up on a snowy mountain. Being forced to endure the cold, this Pokémon evolved and grew fur.

name: Oricorio Baile
flavorText: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.

name: Cutiefly
flavorText: Nectar and pollen are its favorite fare. You can find Cutiefly hovering around Gossifleur, trying to get some of Gossifleur’s pollen.

name: Ribombee
flavorText: It makes pollen puffs from pollen and nectar. The puffs’ effects depend on the type of ingredients and how much of each one is used.

name: Rockruff
flavorText: This Pokémon can bond very strongly with its Trainer, but it also has a habit of biting. Raising a Rockruff for a long time can be challenging.

name: Lycanroc Midday
flavorText: This Lycanroc is calm and cautious. The rocks jutting from its mane are razor sharp.

name: Mareanie
flavorText: The first symptom of its sting is numbness. The next is an itching sensation so intense that it’s impossible to resist the urge to claw at your skin.

name: Toxapex
flavorText: To survive in the cold waters of Galar, this Pokémon forms a dome with its legs, enclosing its body so it can capture its own body heat.

name: Mudbray
flavorText: Loads weighing up to 50 times as much as its own body weight pose no issue for this Pokémon. It’s skilled at making use of mud.

name: Mudsdale
flavorText: Mud that hardens around a Mudsdale’s legs sets harder than stone. It’s so hard that it allows this Pokémon to scrap a truck with a single kick.

name: Dewpider
flavorText: It forms a water bubble at the rear of its body and then covers its head with it. Meeting another Dewpider means comparing water-bubble sizes.

name: Araquanid
flavorText: It launches water bubbles with its legs, drowning prey within the bubbles. This Pokémon can then take its time to savor its meal.

name: Fomantis
flavorText: When bathed in sunlight, this Pokémon emits a pleasantly sweet scent, which causes bug Pokémon to gather around it.

name: Lurantis
flavorText: This Pokémon resembles a beautiful flower. A properly raised Lurantis will have gorgeous, brilliant colors.

name: Salandit
flavorText: Its venom sacs produce a fluid that this Pokémon then heats up with the flame in its tail. This process creates Salandit’s poisonous gas.

name: Salazzle
flavorText: Only female Salazzle exist. They emit a gas laden with pheromones to captivate male Salandit.

name: Bounsweet
flavorText: Its body gives off a sweet, fruity scent that is extremely appetizing to bird Pokémon.

name: Steenee
flavorText: As it twirls like a dancer, a sweet smell spreads out around it. Anyone who inhales the scent will feel a surge of happiness.

name: Tsareena
flavorText: This feared Pokémon has long, slender legs and a cruel heart. It shows no mercy as it stomps on its opponents.

name: Comfey
flavorText: Comfey picks flowers with its vine and decorates itself with them. For some reason, flowers won’t wither once they’re attached to a Comfey.

name: Oranguru
flavorText: With waves of its fan—made from leaves and its own fur—Oranguru skillfully gives instructions to other Pokémon.

name: Passimian
flavorText: Displaying amazing teamwork, they follow the orders of their boss as they all help out in the search for their favorite berries.

name: Sandygast
flavorText: Grudges of the dead have possessed a mound of sand and become a Pokémon. Sandygast is fond of the shovel on its head.

name: Palossand
flavorText: Palossand is known as the Beach Nightmare. It pulls its prey down into the sand by controlling the sand itself, and then it sucks out their souls.

name: Minior Red Meteor
flavorText: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.

name: Komala
flavorText: It is born asleep, and it dies asleep. All its movements are apparently no more than the results of it tossing and turning in its dreams.

name: Mimikyu Disguised
flavorText: It wears a rag fashioned into a Pikachu costume in an effort to look less scary. Unfortunately, the costume only makes it creepier.

name: Bruxish
flavorText: When it unleashes its psychic power from the protuberance on its head, the grating sound of grinding teeth echoes through the area.

name: Jangmo O
flavorText: They learn to fight by smashing their head scales together. The dueling strengthens both their skills and their spirits.

name: Hakamo O
flavorText: The scaleless, scarred parts of its body are signs of its strength. It shows them off to defeated opponents.

name: Kommo O
flavorText: It clatters its tail scales to unnerve opponents. This Pokémon will battle only those who stand steadfast in the face of this display.

name: Magearna
flavorText: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.

name: Grookey
flavorText: When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.

name: Thwackey
flavorText: The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers.

name: Rillaboom
flavorText: By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.

name: Scorbunny
flavorText: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon’s body. Once that happens, it’s ready to fight at full power.

name: Raboot
flavorText: Its thick and fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use hotter fire moves.

name: Cinderace
flavorText: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched.

name: Sobble
flavorText: When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won’t be able to resist weeping.

name: Drizzile
flavorText: A clever combatant, this Pokémon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms.

name: Inteleon
flavorText: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.

name: Skwovet
flavorText: Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries.

name: Greedent
flavorText: It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn’t notice the loss.

name: Rookidee
flavorText: It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit.

name: Corvisquire
flavorText: Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies.

name: Corviknight
flavorText: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.

name: Chewtle
flavorText: Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it.

name: Drednaw
flavorText: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.

name: Rolycoly
flavorText: Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago.

name: Carkol
flavorText: It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokémon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region.

name: Coalossal
flavorText: It’s usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Applin
flavorText: It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokémon, by pretending it’s just an apple and nothing more.

name: Flapple
flavorText: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.

name: Appletun
flavorText: Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on.

name: Silicobra
flavorText: As it digs, it swallows sand and stores it in its neck pouch. The pouch can hold more than 17 pounds of sand.

name: Sandaconda
flavorText: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened.

name: Cramorant
flavorText: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.

name: Arrokuda
flavorText: If it sees any movement around it, this Pokémon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. It’s very proud of that jaw.

name: Barraskewda
flavorText: This Pokémon has a jaw that’s as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda’s flesh is surprisingly tasty, too.

name: Toxel
flavorText: It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows.

name: Toxtricity Amped
flavorText: When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity.

name: Sinistea
flavorText: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.

name: Polteageist
flavorText: This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.

name: Hatenna
flavorText: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. If you don’t have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you.

name: Hattrem
flavorText: No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently.

name: Hatterene
flavorText: It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.

name: Impidimp
flavorText: Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy.

name: Morgrem
flavorText: When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it’s trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair.

name: Grimmsnarl
flavorText: With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp.

name: Perrserker
flavorText: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.

name: Milcery
flavorText: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.

name: Alcremie
flavorText: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream.

name: Falinks
flavorText: Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass’s orders are absolute.

name: Pincurchin
flavorText: It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines.

name: Snom
flavorText: It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps.

name: Frosmoth
flavorText: Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Stonjourner
flavorText: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.

name: Eiscue Ice
flavorText: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold.

name: Indeedee Male
flavorText: It uses the horns on its head to sense the emotions of others. Males will act as valets for those they serve, looking after their every need.

name: Morpeko Full Belly
flavorText: As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It’s also generating electricity.

name: Cufant
flavorText: It digs up the ground with its trunk. It’s also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.

name: Copperajah
flavorText: They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.

name: Duraludon
flavorText: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.

name: Dreepy
flavorText: After being reborn as a ghost Pokémon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas.

name: Drakloak
flavorText: It’s capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they successfully evolve.

name: Dragapult
flavorText: When it isn’t battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.

name: Zamazenta
flavorText: In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle.

name: Urshifu
flavorText: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.

name: Urshifu Rapid Strike
flavorText: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.

name: Calyrex (Ice Rider)
