flavorText: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.

name: Calyrex-Shadow
flavorText: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.

name: Kleavor
flavorText: A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokémon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee.

name: Ursaluna
flavorText: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.

name: Basculegion Male
flavorText: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.

name: Sneasler
flavorText: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs.

name: Overqwil
flavorText: Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself.

name: Enamorus
flavorText: When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui.

name: Sprigatito
flavorText: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.

name: Floragato
flavorText: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.

name: Meowscarada
flavorText: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.

name: Fuecoco
flavorText: It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square-shaped scales to create fire energy.

name: Crocalor
flavorText: The combination of Crocalor’s fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokémon’s head.

name: Skeledirge
flavorText: The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge’s head gained a soul.

name: Quaxly
flavorText: This Pokémon migrated to Paldea from distant lands long ago. The gel secreted by its feathers repels water and grime."

name: Quaxwell
flavorText: These Pokémon constantly run through shallow waters to train their legs, then compete with each other to see which of them kicks most gracefully.

name: Quaquaval
flavorText: A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokémon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands.

name: Lechonk
flavorText: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging.

name: Oinkologne Male
flavorText: Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail.

name: Tarountula
flavorText: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy.

name: Spidops
flavorText: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.

name: Nymble
flavorText: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it’s in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.

name: Lokix
flavorText: When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order.

name: Pawmi
flavorText: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.

name: Pawmo
flavorText: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.

name: Pawmot
flavorText: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.

name: Tandemaus
flavorText: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.

name: Maushold Family Of Four
flavorText: The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure.

name: Fidough
flavorText: This Pokémon is smooth and moist to the touch. Yeast in Fidough’s breath induces fermentation in the Pokémon’s vicinity.

name: Dachsbun
flavorText: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon’s body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.

name: Smoliv
flavorText: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.

name: Dolliv
flavorText: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

name: Arboliva
flavorText: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

name: Squawkabilly Green Plumage
flavorText: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory.

name: Nacli
flavorText: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt.

name: Naclstack
flavorText: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey’s body.

name: Garganacl
flavorText: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.

name: Charcadet
flavorText: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.

name: Armarouge
flavorText: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.

name: Ceruledge
flavorText: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.

name: Tadbulb
flavorText: Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies.

name: Bellibolt
flavorText: When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity.

name: Wattrel
flavorText: When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokémon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them.

name: Kilowattrel
flavorText: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.

name: Maschiff
flavorText: It always scowls in an attempt to make opponents take it seriously, but even crying children will burst into laughter when they see Maschiff’s face.

name: Mabosstiff
flavorText: This Pokémon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies.

name: Shroodle
flavorText: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.

name: Grafaiai
flavorText: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.

name: Bramblin
flavorText: A soul unable to move on to the afterlife was blown around by the wind until it got tangled up with dried grass and became a Pokémon.

name: Brambleghast
flavorText: It will open the branches of its head to envelop its prey. Once it absorbs all the life energy it needs, it expels the prey and discards it.

name: Toedscool
flavorText: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.

name: Toedscruel
flavorText: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.

name: Klawf
flavorText: Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf can’t remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head.

name: Capsakid
flavorText: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.

name: Scovillain
flavorText: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.

name: Rellor
flavorText: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.

name: Rabsca
flavorText: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.

name: Flittle
flavorText: Flittle’s toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokémon’s belly.

name: Espathra
flavorText: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament.

name: Tinkatink
flavorText: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.

name: Tinkatuff
flavorText: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.

name: Tinkaton
flavorText: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.

name: Wiglett
flavorText: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

name: Wugtrio
flavorText: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.

name: Bombirdier
flavorText: It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.

name: Finizen
flavorText: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.

name: Palafin Zero
flavorText: This Pokémon changes its appearance if it hears its allies calling for help. Palafin will never show anybody its moment of transformation.

name: Varoom
flavorText: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

name: Revavroom
flavorText: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders—now numbering eight—to generate energy.

name: Cyclizar
flavorText: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

name: Orthworm
flavorText: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.

name: Glimmet
flavorText: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.

name: Glimmora
flavorText: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.

name: Greavard
flavorText: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.

name: Houndstone
flavorText: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.

name: Flamigo
flavorText: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.

name: Cetoddle
flavorText: This species left the ocean and began living on land a very long time ago. It seems to be closely related to Wailmer.

name: Cetitan
flavorText: This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin.

name: Veluza
flavorText: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.

name: Dondozo
flavorText: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.

name: Tatsugiri Curly
flavorText: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.

name: Annihilape
flavorText: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.

name: Clodsire
flavorText: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It’s a risky move that puts everything on the line.

name: Farigiraf
flavorText: Now that the brain waves from the head and tail are synced up, the psychic power of this Pokémon is 10 times stronger than Girafarig’s.

name: Dudunsparce Two Segment
flavorText: This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles.

name: Kingambit
flavorText: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.

name: Great Tusk
flavorText: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. The name Great Tusk was taken from a creature listed in a certain book.

name: Scream Tail
flavorText: There has been only one reported sighting of this Pokémon. It resembles a mysterious creature depicted in an old expedition journal.

name: Brute Bonnet
flavorText: It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon.

name: Flutter Mane
flavorText: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book.

name: Slither Wing
flavorText: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing.

name: Sandy Shocks
flavorText: No records exist of this Pokémon being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with a creature shown in an expedition journal.

name: Iron Treads
flavorText: This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens.

name: Iron Bundle
flavorText: Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization.

name: Iron Hands
flavorText: It is very similar to a cyborg covered exclusively by a paranormal magazine. The cyborg was said to be the modified form of a certain athlete.

name: Iron Jugulis
flavorText: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot.

name: Iron Moth
flavorText: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.

name: Iron Thorns
flavorText: It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future.

name: Frigibax
flavorText: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.

name: Arctibax
flavorText: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.

name: Baxcalibur
flavorText: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.

name: Gimmighoul
flavorText: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.

name: Gholdengo
flavorText: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

name: Wo Chien
flavorText: The grudge of a person punished for writing the king’s evil deeds upon wooden tablets has clad itself in dead leaves to become a Pokémon.

name: Chien Pao
flavorText: This Pokémon can control 100 tons of fallen snow. It plays around innocently by leaping in and out of avalanches it has caused.

name: Ting Lu
flavorText: The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokémon.

name: Chi Yu
flavorText: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.

name: Roaring Moon
flavorText: It is possible that this is the creature listed as Roaring Moon in an expedition journal that still holds many mysteries.

name: Iron Valiant
flavorText: It has some similarities to a mad scientist’s invention covered in a paranormal magazine.

name: Koraidon
flavorText: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.

name: Miraidon
flavorText: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.

name: Walking Wake
flavorText: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal.

name: Iron Leaves
flavorText: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine.

name: Dipplin
flavorText: Dipplin is two creatures in one Pokémon. Its evolution was triggered by a special apple grown only in one place.

name: Poltchageist
flavorText: Supposedly, the regrets of a tea ceremony master who died before perfecting his craft lingered in some matcha and became a Pokémon.

name: Sinistcha
flavorText: It pretends to be tea, trying to fool people into drinking it so it can drain their life-force. Its ruse is generally unsuccessful.

name: Okidogi
flavorText: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.

name: Munkidori
flavorText: The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokémon's psychic powers to bloom.

name: Fezandipiti
flavorText: Fezandipiti owes its beautiful looks and lovely voice to the toxic stimulants emanating from the chain wrapped around its body.

name: Ogerpon
flavorText: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.

name: Archaludon
flavorText: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.

name: Hydrapple
flavorText: Seven syrpents live inside an apple made of syrup. The syrpent in the center is the commander.

name: Gouging Fire
flavorText: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame.

name: Raging Bolt
flavorText: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.

name: Iron Boulder
flavorText: It resembles a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a Terrakion that had been modified by an evil organization.

name: Iron Crown
flavorText: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion.

name: Terapagos
flavorText: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.

name: Pecharunt
flavorText: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will.
